jobs.title: FX Risk Management Sales Intern (f/m/x)
jobs.requirements:
Must be eligible to work in France.
Must be able to provide an internship agreement.
Good verbal and written communication capabilities in French and English is mandatory.
Good spirit of analysis, synthesis and rigour.
Strong interest and knowledge in financial product and industry.
Strong commitment and autonomy.

jobs.title: Internship - Product Management DWS France
jobs.requirements:
Ability to work independently as well as in a team
Good relationship and communication skills
Critical thinking and attention to detail
Good MS-Office Skills, knowledge in process automation is an asset (Power Automate, Power Query, Office Scripts and other automation tools).
Fluency in French and English; German is an asset
You are enrolled in your penultimate or last year of study, or on a gap year in between your Bachelor’s and Master’s degree.

jobs.title: Sales, Trading and Structuring Off Cycle Internship Programme 2026 Paris
jobs.requirements:
Identification of opportunities, development of business cases, management of the deployment and launch of new products and services for the global markets division.
Management of the development and implementation of financial models and strategies that support in decision making in the global markets division.
Training and mentoring of junior colleagues.
Analyst Expectations
Will have an impact on the work of related teams within the area.
Partner with other functions and business areas.

jobs.title: Corporate Banking Coverage Intern (f/m/x)
jobs.requirements:
Strong interest for the Financial Industry.
Must be eligible to work in France with a valid convention de stage.
Good verbal and written communication capabilities in French and English is mandatory.
Client oriented.
Good spirit of analysis, synthesis, and rigor.
Reactivity and dynamism.

jobs.title: Banking, Capital Markets, Summer Analyst, London – United Kingdom 2026
jobs.requirements:
Your time here will look something like this...
Demonstrate ways to limit interest rates and credit risk through the use of derivatives.
Originate, market, structure, and execute fixed income and equity transactions.
Work and interact with corporate clients
Contribute to overall fixed income and equity relationships
We want to hear from you if...

jobs.title: 2026 Blackstone Private Equity H2 Off Cycle Internship (London)
jobs.description: 40745 | Private Equity
jobs.requirements:
Blackstone seeks to hire individuals who are highly motivated, intelligent, and have demonstrated excellence in prior endeavours. In addition to strong analytical and quantitative skills, the successful
candidate should (have):
Strong verbal and written communication skills
Proficiency in accounting and finance concepts
Excellent attention to detail
A desire to work in a collaborative team environment with dynamic roles and willingness to contribute to a positive culture
